chunks.text: Haile Shavers is the Literal Face of Diversity in Tech - EECS at Berkeley CS Scholar Haile Shavers is the subject of an interview by Youth Radio/The Huffington Post in which she discusses her experiences as a black woman undergraduate studying computer science. Haile graces a billboard on Broadway and 22nd Street in Oakland, sponsored by the Kapor Center for Social Impact, which reads “As Oakland becomes more tech, let’s ensure tech becomes more Oakland.” Categories Diversity Students View Open Faculty Positions
